name: marketing-machine

plugins.name: marketing-machine
plugins.description: Complete marketing system with 50+ skills: copywriting, SEO audit, AI SEO, CRO, email sequences, paid ads, A/B testing, content strategy, social content, programmatic SEO, referral programs, churn prevention, pricing strategy, sales enablement, and more. Built around reusable foundation files for audience, positioning, customer journey, and brand voice.
